acceptance_criteria.text: Dialog creation lets a user describe an agent in natural language, asks clarifying questions, shows preview, and creates a blueprint.
proof: Production dialog builder API smoke passed.
Authenticated browser smoke verified create-from-preview UX.

acceptance_criteria.text: Run detail/journal stays human-readable and hides technical payload behind technical journal.
proof: Unit journal test verifies human-readable labels.

acceptance_criteria.text: Datahub-lite distinguishes connected sources, available LocalOS sources, and sources used in the latest run.
proof: Unit test verifies used source selection.

acceptance_criteria.text: Version UX shows active version, diff/changed fields, activate/rollback, and run-specific version controls.
proof: VersionSummary remains active and full agent blueprint test suite passed.

acceptance_criteria.text: Email, table, and reviews agents work end-to-end as draft/result generators without external sends or publishes.
proof: Production email/table/reviews smokes passed with no external dispatch.

acceptance_criteria.text: Safety smoke proves generic agents do not dispatch externally and require approvals.
proof: Production generic boundaries smoke passed: dispatcher_started=false, approvals_required=true.

acceptance_criteria.text: Production deploy and smoke checks pass, with temporary fixtures cleaned.
proof: Cleanup checks returned zero smoke users/businesses.

known_gaps: GigaChat SSL warning remains under the existing explicit workaround.
